message:
feat(animation): add Callbacks wrapper for animation event hooks

Introduce Callbacks, a wrapper that tracks animation lifecycle events
for milestone-based notifications.

New module (callbacks.rs):
- Callbacks<A>: wraps any Animation
- AnimationEvent enum: Started, Progress(f64), Completed, Cancelled
- Configurable event triggers:
  * on_start(): emit when animation begins
  * on_complete(): emit when animation finishes
  * at_progress(threshold): emit when crossing progress percentage
- drain_events(): poll accumulated events

Stagger improvements:
- Better edge case handling
- Documentation clarifications

Mod.rs updates:
- Export callbacks module
- Animation trait refinements

This enables reactive patterns where UI updates trigger based on
animation progress without polling the animation value directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
